parameters.query:
INSERT INTO kiotviet_product_cache (
  kiotviet_product_id,
  product_code,
  product_name,
  barcode,
  category_id,
  category_name,
  base_price,
  cost,
  inventory_quantity,
  is_active,
  last_synced_at
) VALUES (
  {{$json.kiotviet_product_id}},
  {{$json.product_code ? "'" + $json.product_code.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL'}},
  {{$json.product_name ? "'" + $json.product_name.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL'}},
  {{$json.barcode ? "'" + $json.barcode.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL'}},
  {{$json.category_id ?? 'NULL'}},
  {{$json.category_name ? "'" + $json.category_name.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL'}},
  {{$json.base_price ?? 'NULL'}},
  {{$json.cost ?? 'NULL'}},
  {{$json.inventory_quantity ?? 0}},
  {{$json.is_active ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE'}},
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (kiotviet_product_id) DO UPDATE SET
  product_code = EXCLUDED.product_code,
  product_name = EXCLUDED.product_name,
  barcode = EXCLUDED.barcode,
  category_id = EXCLUDED.category_id,
  category_name = EXCLUDED.category_name,
  base_price = EXCLUDED.base_price,
  cost = EXCLUDED.cost,
  inventory_quantity = EXCLUDED.inventory_quantity,
  is_active = EXCLUDED.is_active,
  last_synced_at = NOW();
